## What is this?

- Add a dark mode toggle to the header.

## What changed?

- Added a theme toggle button.
- Saved the selected theme in local storage.
- Applied the saved theme on app load.

## Reviewer guide

- Open the app and switch themes.
- Refresh the page.
- Confirm the selected theme is preserved.
